bloodrage.title: bloodrage
bloodrage.name: [color=#a03030]Sum Uri[/color]
bloodrage.description:
Apply [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color] to yourself and remove all [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color]

Gain additional [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color] for each removed [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Bloodrage grants bonus speed and accuracy dice for 5 turns[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]kill[/color] an enemy unit while under the effects of [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color]
bloodrage.description_short:
Apply 5 [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color] to yourself and remove all [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color] from yourself
Apply [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]kill[/color] an enemy unit while under the effects of [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color] 
[color=#a03030]Bloodrage:[/color] per stack: [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5 on [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]

halhala.title: halhala
halhala.name: [color=#a03030]Ur Halhala[/color]
halhala.description:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#ff2020]Blood[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

Repeats for each [color=#a03030]Bloodrage[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 15 * weapon size[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
halhala.description_short:
Deal [color=#ff2020]Blood[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range
Add 1 [color=#78bca4]charge[/color] to [color=#a03030]Sum Uri[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = Weapon Size * Bloodrage stacks * 5[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

damu.title: damu
damu.name: [color=#a03030]Ur Damu[/color]
damu.description:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself for 25% of max Life

Apply [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color] to yourself 3 times

[color=#a0a0a0]Bleed deals Blood damage every turn for 3 turns[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
damu.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself for 25% of [color=#ff8080]max Life[/color]
Apply 10 [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color] to yourself
[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
[color=#ff1010]Bleed:[/color] per stack: dealt 5 [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]step[/color] / [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

meditate.title: meditate
meditate.name: [color=#8080f0]Med Vohu[/color]
meditate.description:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = 4 * WIL[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
meditate.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 200
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

awe.title: awe
awe.name: [color=#8080f0]Yazata[/color]
awe.description:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to all units in a 4 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 2 * (DEX+WIL)[/color]

[color=#e05050]*Penalized by inflexible armor[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#78bca4]recite[/color] the [color=#8080f0]Med Vohu[/color]
awe.description_short:
Deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to all enemies in a 4 tile range
[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#78bca4]recite[/color] the [color=#8080f0]Med Vohu[/color]

vendi.title: vendi
vendi.name: [color=#8080f0]Vendi[/color]
vendi.description:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to the closest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * (STR+WIL)[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+3 charge[/color] when you [color=#78bca4]recite[/color] the [color=#8080f0]Yazata[/color]
vendi.description_short:
Deal 200 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to the closest enemy, [color=#ffff50]repeat[/color] per stack of [color=#80a0f0]Grace[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#78bca4]recite[/color] the [color=#8080f0]Yazata[/color]

leget.title: leget
leget.name: [color=#20af20]Leget Mhor[/color]
leget.description:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself for 15 life and remove all [color=#20af20]Sickness[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffff50]enemy dies[/color] while [color=#ffff50]standing on sacred grass[/color]
leget.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 150 and remove all [color=#20af20]Sickness[/color] from yourself
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 150 life to all allies in a 2 tile range
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffff50]enemy dies[/color] while [color=#ffff50]standing on divine grass[/color]

alu.title: alu
alu.name: [color=#20af20]Uttuk Alu[/color]
alu.description:
Uses [color=#78bca4]all charges[/color]

Deal [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = Charges used * 4 * WIL[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffff50]enemy dies[/color] while [color=#ffff50]standing on sacred grass[/color]
alu.description_short:
Uses [color=#78bca4]all charges[/color]
Deal 50 [color=#a0a0a0]* charges used[/color] [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range
Create [color=#20af20]divine grass[/color] in a 1 tile range
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffff50]enemy dies[/color] while [color=#ffff50]standing on divine grass[/color]

musma.title: musma
musma.name: [color=#20af20]Loh Musma[/color]
musma.description:
Summon a [color=#20af70]Musmahu[/color]

Set your [color=#20af20]Uttuk Alu[/color] [color=#78bca4]charges[/color] to 30

[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when [color=#ffff50]your glory rises[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Musmahus are gigantic serpents of Ninhurs that attack with poison and death[/color]
musma.description_short:
Summon a [color=#20af70]Musmahu[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiar[/color]
Set your [color=#20af20]Uttuk Alu[/color] [color=#78bca4]charges[/color] to 30
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when [color=#ffff50]your glory rises[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Musmahus are gigantic plant-serpents of Ninhurs that spread divine grass[/color]

dorova.title: dorova
dorova.name: [color=#60b0ff]Het Dorova[/color]
dorova.description:
For each [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] you have, [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] yourself

Apply [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = 3 * WIL[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
dorova.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 20 per stack of [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] and remove all [color=#5070ff]Freeze[/color] from yourself
[color=#78bca4]+3 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

tyrana.title: tyrana
tyrana.name: [color=#60b0ff]Va Tyrana[/color]
tyrana.description:
For each [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] you have, [color=#ffff50]deal[/color] [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to the closest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = WIL[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when apply [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] to yourself while an enemy lives
tyrana.description_short:
Apply [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] to yourself equal to your current stacks of [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

muruga.title: muruga
muruga.name: [color=#60b0ff]Ra Muruga[/color]
muruga.description:
Per [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] stack, [color=#ffff50]deal[/color] [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage to all enemies in a 2 tile range

Remove all [color=#60b0ff]Dreams[/color] from yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * WIL[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when apply [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] to yourself while an enemy lives
muruga.description_short:
Deal [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] and [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to all enemies in a 4 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * Dream stacks[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+2 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

senheb.title: senheb
senheb.name: [color=#d09000]Senheb[/color]
senheb.description:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself and [color=#ffff50]deal[/color] [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to the closest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage and heal = 2 * WIL[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]
senheb.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] and remove all [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] / [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] from yourself
[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = your Armor[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]

sedjhet.title: sedjhet
sedjhet.name: [color=#d09000]Sedjhet[/color]
sedjhet.description:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to all enemies in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = Your armor * 3[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]
sedjhet.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to all enemies in a 2 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = your Armor[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]

neter.title: neter
neter.name: [color=#d09000]Neter Ammah[/color]
neter.description:
Summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]
neter.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to the closest enemy
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 2 * your Armor[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you summon a [color=#d09000]Gilded Dead[/color]

ti.title: ti
ti.name: [color=#ff8000]Nesh Ti[/color]
ti.description_short:
Uses [color=#78bca4]all charges[/color]
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 200 [color=#a0a0a0]* charges used[/color], remove all [color=#ff7000]Scorch[/color] from yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

zatu.title: zatu
zatu.name: [color=#ff8000]Nesh Zatu[/color]
zatu.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] 200 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage in a path to 5 enemies in a 4 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Repeat for each charge of Nesh Ti[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

girra.title: girra
girra.name: [color=#ff8000]Nesh Girra[/color]
girra.description_short:
Uses [color=#78bca4]all charges[/color]
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to adjacent units
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 100% of Main-hand Hit, repeat for each charge of Nesh Ti[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] a unit

gibija.title: gibija
gibija.name: [color=#a0a000]Gibija[/color]
gibija.description_short:
Summon 5 [color=#a0a000]Slouching Dead[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
[color=#a0a0a0]Slouching Dead are waddling undead servants of Eresh[/color]

sluga.title: sluga
sluga.name: [color=#a0a000]Sluga[/color]
sluga.description_short:
Summon 1 [color=#a0a000]Slouching Dead[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an enemy [color=#ffff50]dies[/color] in a 2 tile range

razaranja.title: razaranja
razaranja.name: [color=#a0a000]Razaranja[/color]
razaranja.description_short:
Summon a [color=#a0a000]Mouth of Eresh[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiar[/color] and apply 25 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when [color=#ffff50]your glory rises[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Mouths of Eresh are undead projections of grief and hunger that attack all enemies in range with a deathly howl[/color]

contemplation.title: contemplation
contemplation.name: [color=#cf6f40]Grim Contemplation[/color]
contemplation.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself for 20% of your max Life and remove all non-[color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] [color=#ffff50]Effects[/color] from yourself
Each [color=#78bca4]charge[/color] grants [color=#5050ff]+10 Armor[/color] and [color=#5050ff]+10 Block[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

punishment.title: punishment
punishment.name: [color=#cf6f40]Sober Punishment[/color]
punishment.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#af8f50]Blunt[/color] damage in a path to the furthest enemy
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = your missing life[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you are [color=#ffff50]dealt damage by an enemy[/color], [color=#ff5050]-1 charge[/color] when you [color=#50ff50]heal[/color]

violence.title: violence
violence.name: [color=#cf6f40]Rigid Violence[/color]
violence.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Perform[/color] an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy
[color=#a0a0a0]Perform additional extra attacks for each point of Inflexibility[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] with [color=#ffff50]at least 1 adjacent enemy[/color], [color=#ff5050]else -1 charge[/color]

hurah.title: hurah
hurah.name: [color=#60ffb0]Hurah[/color]
hurah.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself
[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = 5 * your Speed[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]kill[/color] an enemy unit

yirah.title: yirah
yirah.name: [color=#60ffb0]Yirah[/color]
yirah.description_short:
Remove all [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] / [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] / [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color] from yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color]

selem.title: selem
selem.name: [color=#60ffb0]Selem[/color]
selem.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] [color=#af8f50]Slash[/color] damage to all enemies in a 2 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 50 * your Speed[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]step adjacent to an enemy[/color], [color=#ff5050]-1 charge[/color] when you suffer a [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]

drow.title: drow
drow.name: [color=#ff5000]Proso Drow[/color]
drow.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 500
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

moc.title: moc
moc.name: [color=#ff5000]Proso Moc[/color]
moc.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Deal[/color] damage to all units in a 3 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 100 * stacks of Drakeform on self, Damage type = Main-hand weapon[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

miana.title: miana
miana.name: [color=#ff5000]Proso Miana[/color]
miana.description_short:
[color=#ffff50]Apply[/color] 5 [color=#ff8000]Drakeform[/color] to yourself, remove all [color=#ff5050]harmful[/color] effects from yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#78bca4]recite[/color] the [color=#ff5000]Proso Moc[/color]

turba.title: turba
turba.name: [color=#ffa0f0]Turba[/color]
turba.description_short:
Per allied [color=#ffa0f0]Ant[/color], summon a random [color=#ffa0f0]Ant[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiar[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

spera.title: spera
spera.name: [color=#ffa0f0]Spera[/color]
spera.description_short:
Grant [color=#20ff20]+10 Speed[/color] and [color=#ff8030]+100 Hit[/color] to allied units
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when [color=#ffff50]an adjacent ally is damaged by an enemy[/color]

viva.title: viva
viva.name: [color=#ffa0f0]Viva Formica[/color]
viva.description_short:
Summon a random [color=#ffa0f0]Ant[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiar[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffa0f0]Ant[/color] [color=#ffff50]kills[/color] a unit

prota.title: prota
prota.name: [color=#fff0a0]Prota[/color]
prota.description_short:
Eris is silent...
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

defteros.title: defteros
defteros.name: [color=#fff0a0]Defteros[/color]
defteros.description_short:
Eris is silent...
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

tritos.title: tritos
tritos.name: [color=#fff0a0]Tritos[/color]
tritos.description_short:
Eris is silent...
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

ygeia.title: ygeia
ygeia.name: [color=#ff7070]Ygeia[/color]
ygeia.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself
[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = your Block[/color]
Gain [color=#ffff50]+50%[/color] Block chance [color=#ff5050]if[/color] this prayer is fully-charged 
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

doru.title: doru
doru.name: [color=#ff7070]Doru[/color]
doru.description_short:
Deal 50 [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage to the closest enemy, [color=#ffff50]repeat[/color] an amount of times equal to your total [color=#ff0000]Weapon Size[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]block[/color]

tekton.title: tekton
tekton.name: [color=#ff7070]Tekton[/color]
tekton.description_short:
Permanently upgrade your Off-hand item [color=#ff8030]+30 base Hit[/color] / [color=#5050ff]+30 Block[/color]
[color=#707070]upgrades Main-hand if no Off-hand equipped[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

oriad.title: oriad
oriad.name: [color=#8040a0]Oriad[/color]
oriad.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself to full life
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]transform an item[/color]

mira.title: mira
mira.name: [color=#8040a0]Teth Mira[/color]
mira.description_short:
Summon 3 [color=#8040a0]Tentacles[/color] at random tiles
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ff8030]attack with a bare fist[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Tentacles are appendages of Oros that inherit your Main-hand Hit[/color]

ogra.title: ogra
ogra.name: [color=#8040a0]Teth Ogra[/color]
ogra.description_short:
Summon 6 [color=#8040a0]Tentacles[/color] at random tiles
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffff50]adjacent enemy[/color] dies

yahrub.title: yahrub
yahrub.name: [color=#90ff60]Yahrub[/color]
yahrub.description_short:
[color=#a030b0]Teleport[/color] self and all allies to random tiles, each applies 5 [color=#a030b0]Stasis[/color] to itself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

wizara.title: wizara
wizara.name: [color=#90ff60]Wizara[/color]
wizara.description_short:
[color=#a030b0]Teleport[/color] all enemies to random tiles, each applies 5 [color=#a030b0]Stasis[/color] to itself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still adjacent to an enemy[/color]

yamur.title: yamur
yamur.name: [color=#90ff60]Yamur[/color]
yamur.description_short:
[color=#a030b0]Teleport[/color] a random enemy to a tile adjacent to you
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]teleport[/color]

gula.title: gula
gula.name: [color=#ff8030]Gula[/color]
gula.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself and all allies for 10% of your max Life
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] an adjacent unit

umam.title: umam
umam.name: [color=#ff8030]Umam[/color]
umam.description_short:
Summon a [color=#ff8030]Beast of Mardok[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiar[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
[color=#a0a0a0]Beasts of Mardok are splendid monsters that inherit your Main-hand Hit[/color]

namkalag.title: namkalag
namkalag.name: [color=#ff8030]Nam-Kalag[/color]
namkalag.description_short:
Allied [color=#c050ff]familiars[/color] gain [color=#ff8030]+50% Hit[/color] 
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

bahu.title: bahu
bahu.name: [color=#50f080]Bahu[/color]
bahu.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] 50 and apply 5 [color=#50f080]Refraction[/color] to yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] if [color=#ffff50]enemies live[/color] and [color=#ffff50]there are no adjacent enemies[/color]
[color=#50f080]Refraction:[/color] per stack: [color=#5050ff]+1 Armor[/color], deal 10 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to the attacker on [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]

chundu.title: chundu
chundu.name: [color=#50f080]Chundu[/color]
chundu.description_short:
Re-apply each [color=#9060a0]self-applied Effect[/color] on yourself by [color=#ffff50]50%[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

gongu.title: gongu
gongu.name: [color=#50f080]Gongu[/color]
gongu.description_short:
Deal [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage in a path to the furthest enemy
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 2500 + total stacks of Effects on self[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]kill[/color] an enemy unit

eranya.title: eranya
eranya.name: [color=#0070ff]Eranya[/color]
eranya.description_short:
Summon 2 [color=#30ffaf]Teal Prismas[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Teal Prismas attack with cold damage[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]step[/color] [color=#ff5050]if not[/color] [color=#ffff50]adjacent to an enemy[/color]

omranya.title: omranya
omranya.name: [color=#0070ff]Omranya[/color]
omranya.description_short:
Summon 4 [color=#af9040]Topaz Prismas[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Topaz Prismas attack with fire damage and have vigilance against adjacent enemies[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+2 charges[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

anranya.title: anranya
anranya.name: [color=#0070ff]Anranya[/color]
anranya.description_short:
Summon 1 [color=#af30af]Garnet Prisma[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Garnet Prismas attack all enemies in sight with astral damage[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]step[/color] [color=#ff5050]if not[/color] [color=#ffff50]adjacent to an enemy[/color]

glyad.title: glyad
glyad.name: [color=#ff9000]Glyad[/color]
glyad.description_short:
Apply [color=#ffa070]Blind[/color] to all enemies
[color=#a0a0a0]Blind applied = your Glory[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]kill[/color] an enemy unit

goret.title: goret
goret.name: [color=#ff9000]Goret[/color]
goret.description_short:
Apply [color=#ff7000]Scorch[/color] to all enemies
[color=#a0a0a0]Scorch applied = your Glory[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+5 charges[/color] when [color=#ffff50]your glory rises[/color]

krasota.title: krasota
krasota.name: [color=#ff9000]Krasota[/color]
krasota.description_short:
Deal 1000 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself [color=#707070]cannot be raised / lowered[/color]
Gain [color=#ffff50]+100%[/color] damage [color=#ff5050]if[/color] this prayer is [color=#ff5050]not[/color] fully-charged 
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] on [color=#78bca4]divine intervention[/color]

eird.title: eird
eird.name: [color=#ffd000]Du' Eird[/color]
eird.description_short:
Apply 20 [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] to yourself
[color=#ff5050]If no enemies live[/color] deal 300 [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

eiqab.title: eiqab
eiqab.name: [color=#ffd000]Eiqab[/color]
eiqab.description_short:
Deal 200 [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to all enemies with [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live

muejab.title: muejab
muejab.name: [color=#ffd000]Muejab[/color]
muejab.description_short:
Deal [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to 1 enemy at any range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 25% of your maximum Life[/color] 
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an enemy with [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] takes a step

auzom.title: auzom
auzom.name: [color=#ff50ff]Ag' Auzom[/color]
auzom.description_short:
Deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage in a path to 1 enemy at any range
Repeat with [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage
[color=#78bca4]+2 charges[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

ragna.title: ragna
ragna.name: [color=#ff50ff]Ag' Ragna[/color]
ragna.description_short:
Deal 500 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to adjacent units
Repeat with [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage
[color=#78bca4]+2 charges[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

agara.title: agara
agara.name: [color=#ff50ff]Ag' Agara[/color]
agara.description_short:
Add 1 [color=#78bca4]charge[/color] to [color=#ff50ff]Ag' Auzom[/color] and [color=#ff50ff]Ag' Ragna[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+3 charges[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

enq.title: enq
enq.name: [color=#80af00]Enq[/color]
enq.description_short:
Per enemy, [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 10
[color=#78bca4]+2 charges[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

cheren.title: cheren
cheren.name: [color=#80af00]Cheren[/color]
cheren.description_short:
Gain [color=#ff8080]+20 max Life[/color] and deal [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to yourself
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 100 * number of enemies[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]pick up[/color] an item, [color=#ff5050]-1 charge[/color] when an ally [color=#ffff50]dies[/color], if enemies live

khairkhan.title: khairkhan
khairkhan.name: [color=#80af00]Khairkhan[/color]
khairkhan.description_short:
Per enemy, deal 50 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area

prakara.title: prakara
prakara.name: [color=#90ff20]Prakara[/color]
prakara.description_short:
Uses [color=#78bca4]all charges[/color]
Deal [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] and [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to all units in a 4 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = charges used * your missing Life[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you are [color=#ffff50]attacked by an adjacent enemy[/color]

ksudha.title: ksudha
ksudha.name: [color=#90ff20]Ksudha[/color]
ksudha.description_short:
[color=#50ff50]Heal[/color] yourself for 20 [color=#a0a0a0]* charges of Prakara[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an [color=#ffff50]adjacent enemy dies[/color]

rogoga.title: rogoga
rogoga.name: [color=#90ff20]Rogoga[/color]
rogoga.description_short:
Apply [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color] and [color=#ff2020]Bleed[/color] to all enemies equal to the [color=#a0a0a0]charges of Prakara[/color] 
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
[color=#70ff00]Sickness:[/color] per stack: [color=#ff3030]-10[/color] [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color], dealt 5 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]
[color=#ff1010]Bleed:[/color] per stack: dealt 5 [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage on [color=#ffff50]step[/color] / [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]

isfet.title: isfet
isfet.name: [color=#700090]Pha Isfet[/color]
isfet.description_short:
Deal [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to yourself and to all units in a 2 tile range
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 15 * your Strength[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an enemy [color=#ffff50]dies[/color]

hetep.title: hetep
hetep.name: [color=#700090]Pha Hetep[/color]
hetep.description_short:
Remove all [color=#ff5050]harmful[/color] effects from yourself
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an enemy [color=#ffff50]dies[/color]

neheb.title: neheb
neheb.name: [color=#700090]Pha Neheb[/color]
neheb.description_short:
Uses [color=#78bca4]all charges[/color]
Deal [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to yourself and all enemies
[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 30 * your Strength[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+2 charges[/color] when [color=#ffff50]your glory rises[/color]

sahru.title: sahru
sahru.name: [color=#ff6030]Sahru[/color]
sahru.description_short:
Remove all [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] from yourself

Apply them to all allies

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live

rabisu.title: rabisu
rabisu.name: [color=#ff6030]Rabisu[/color]
rabisu.description_short:
Force all allies to [color=#ff8030]hit[/color] 1 enemy in range

Replicate their [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color] onto that enemy

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when an adjacent ally is [color=#ffff50]damaged by an enemy[/color]

balatu.title: balatu
balatu.name: [color=#ff6030]Balatu[/color]
balatu.description_short:
Heal yourself and all allies based on their [color=#ff5050]harmful Effects[/color]
[color=#a0a0a0]Heal = 10 * your Willpower * harmful effects[/color]
[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] if enemies live
